task: Forward-fix for the #687 double-bill vulnerability: require Idempotency-Key on /insurance/policies, partial-UNIQUE bill_uuid, replay-skip pre-check, atomic hard-fail+rollback with bill void / CRITICAL Sentry on orphans, and bill the down payment so down + sum(installments) === total_premium. Additive-only; keeps bill_uuid + vendor_id from #687.
financial_rule: Bills are created/voided ONLY via createBill()/voidBill() from apps/backend/src/accounting/bills.service.ts. No new financial ledger code.
